channel.title: Slides on Ubuntu Venezuela
channel.description: Recent content in Slides on Ubuntu Venezuela

item.title: Ubuntu Venezuela Community
item.description: Be part of the local Ubuntu team in Venezuela. Participate in events, help with translations, support, and share with the largest free software community in the country.

item.title: Ubuntu 23.10
item.description: Ubuntu 23.10 Mantic Minotaur is the latest version released in October 2023. You can get it today, and run it on various environments such as Desktop, Servers, IoT, Cloud and much more.
